summary: Full backend + frontend testing of ArchtiX motion website. All 6 backend pytest tests passed (POST/GET /api/inquiries incl. valid payload, minimal payload, invalid email 422, missing required fields 422, list sorted newest-first, no _id leak). Frontend playwright tests validated all 5 pages loading via nav links, hero-cta/footer-cta/nav-cta all navigate to /contact, contact form empty submit shows error toast (no API call), full contact form submission shows success state + toast + persists to DB, mobile menu toggle opens/closes correctly. Zero console errors.

issues: Framer-motion emits 4 console warnings: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' — cosmetic, does not affect functionality. Likely a scroll container in a Reveal / motion component missing `position: relative`.

action_items: (Low priority / cosmetic) Investigate framer-motion scroll-offset warning: add `position: relative` to the container passed as target/offset in Reveal or scroll-linked motion components.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: created_at is stored as ISO string in Mongo then re-parsed to datetime in GET — works but inconsistent. Consider storing as native BSON datetime for sort stability.
server.py: Sort is on 'created_at' string field. Since ISO-8601 UTC strings sort lexicographically = chronologically, this works but is fragile if TZ format changes. Storing as datetime is safer.
server.py: List endpoint has no pagination (to_list(1000) hard limit). Fine for MVP inquiry volume but should paginate later.
server.py: No rate limiting on public POST /api/inquiries — spam risk in production.
Contact.jsx: client-side validation only checks name/email/message presence; missing regex/format check for phone. Server-side EmailStr covers email format.
Contact.jsx: axios error handler swallows server error details — could surface `err.response.data` in dev for easier debugging.
seed_data_creation: Test inquiries prefixed with TEST_ created in Mongo via API (via tests + playwright form submit). Not cleaned up but harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs cleanly via `pytest /app/backend/tests/`. Frontend testids used: nav-logo, nav-link-{home,about,services,projects,contact}, nav-cta, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-mobile-menu, hero-cta, footer-cta, contact-input-{name,email,phone,message}, contact-select-service (native select), contact-submit, contact-success. Base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found. Only minor framer-motion scroll-container warning (cosmetic).
